=Module <<a_api_type | module Multipart >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Multipart>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Multipart >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
<<pre id="VALsection" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|section>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Logs>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|src>>>>>><<pre id="VALscan_multipart_body_from_stream" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|scan~_multipart~_body~_from~_stream>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?max_size: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Int64>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| boundary: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| create: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> 'a<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| add: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| stop: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int64 <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> 'b <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  string <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_base>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_stream>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|stream>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEcontent_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|content~_type>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> * <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list>> >><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEfile_info"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|file~_info>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~{>>
<<span class="odocwiki_record"|<<span class="odocwiki_field"|<<span class="odocwiki_field_descr"|  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"|tmp_filename:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~;>> >>>><<span class="odocwiki_field"|<<span class="odocwiki_field_descr"|  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"|filesize:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|int64>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~;>> >>>><<span class="odocwiki_field"|<<span class="odocwiki_field_descr"|  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"|raw_original_filename:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~;>> >>>><<span class="odocwiki_field"|<<span class="odocwiki_field_descr"|  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"|file_content_type:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="content_type" | type Multipart.content_type >> option>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~;>> >>>>>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~}>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEpost_data"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|post~_data>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list * <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * <<a_api text="file_info" | type Multipart.file_info >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list>> >><<pre id="VALpost_params" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|post~_params>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| content_type: >><<a_api text="content_type" | type Multipart.content_type >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp_lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Body>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Int64>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="post_data" | type Multipart.post_data >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >>\\  option>>>><<pre id="VALparse_content_type" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|parse~_content~_type>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="content_type" | type Multipart.content_type >> option>>>>
